configurations.name: Android: Build+Install (Wait For Device)
configurations.command: if ! ${env:HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb devices | grep -q '^emulator-5554\s'; then ${env:HOME}/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -avd Medium_Phone_API_36.1 -netdelay none -netspeed full -no-snapshot-load -no-snapshot-save >/tmp/rhythmverse-emulator.log 2>&1 & fi; ${env:HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 wait-for-device; until [ "$(${env:HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r')" = "1" ]; do sleep 2; done; until ${env:HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell cmd package list packages >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done; dotnet build ${workspaceFolder}/RhythmVerseClient/RhythmVerseClient.csproj -t:Install -p:EnableAndroid=true -f net10.0-android -p:Device=emulator-5554 -p:EmbedAssembliesIntoApk=true -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=$HOME/Android/Sdk

configurations.name: Android: Install To Emulator (emulator-5554)
configurations.command: if ! ${env:HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb devices | grep -q '^emulator-5554\s'; then ${env:HOME}/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -avd Medium_Phone_API_36.1 -netdelay none -netspeed full -no-snapshot-load -no-snapshot-save >/tmp/rhythmverse-emulator.log 2>&1 & fi; ${env:HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 wait-for-device; until [ "$(${env:HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r')" = "1" ]; do sleep 2; done; until ${env:HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell cmd package list packages >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done; dotnet build ${workspaceFolder}/RhythmVerseClient/RhythmVerseClient.csproj -t:Install -p:EnableAndroid=true -f net10.0-android -p:Device=emulator-5554 -p:EmbedAssembliesIntoApk=true -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=$HOME/Android/Sdk
